creator: jhibbits@FreeBSD.org
text:
Just like multimedia/cuse4bsd-kmod (ports/179164), sysutils/lsof includes sys/pcpu.h, which requires that AIM or BOOKE be defined else the CTASSERT triggers on line 188 of sys/pcpu.h

Fix: 

As with ports/179164 possibly unconditionally set AIM or BOOKE when building lsof for powerpc.
How-To-Repeat: Build lsof on powerpc or powerpc64
